body.gate: requires Gmail/Google identity (T-uc-gmail-google) to land first
body.title: feat: Igor own GitHub identity — separate PAT + dual-identity in github.py
body.result: cancelled — Igor GitHub identity deferred indefinitely; not on critical path
body.description:
## Imported from GH#187 (created 2026-03-12, open)

Igor acts as himself on GitHub — files issues, comments, closes tickets, self-assigns — with his own account rather than Akien's. Clean audit trail: Igor's work shows as Igor's.

Steps:
1. Create Igor's GitHub account (Akien does this) — suggested username `theigorsigor`, verify via theigorsigor@gmail.com, add as collaborator with Write access.
2. Generate Igor's PAT (Akien does this) — scopes: repo (issues, PRs, comments). Add to `~/.TheIgors/igor_wild_0001/.env`: `IGOR_GITHUB_TOKEN=<pat>`.
3. Update tools/github.py — add `_igor_headers()` alongside existing `_headers()` using IGOR_GITHUB_TOKEN. Igor-initiated actions (create_issue, comment, close, self-assign) use Igor's token. Akien-scoped actions keep GITHUB_TOKEN. Fallback: if IGOR_GITHUB_TOKEN unset, fall back to GITHUB_TOKEN with a warning.
4. Seed identity habit `FACTUAL_IGOR_GITHUB`: username, how to self-assign, when to comment vs. stay quiet.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/github.py (add _igor_headers + dual-identity routing); ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/.env (IGOR_GITHUB_TOKEN — Akien adds out of band); a new identity-seed file (lab/claudecode/seed_igor_github_identity.py or similar); tests/test_github_dual_identity.py.

**Design rules:** no-secrets-in-repo (PAT lives in .env); docs-in-code; test-plan-or-why-not.

**Scope boundary:** IN — dual-identity in github.py + identity habit seed + fallback when token unset. OUT — Step 1 (Akien creates account); Step 2 (Akien generates PAT) — those are Akien-tasks, ticket waits on them.

**Test plan:** tests/test_github_dual_identity.py — assert _igor_headers uses IGOR_GITHUB_TOKEN when set; falls back to _headers with warning when unset; create_issue routed through Igor's token in Igor-initiated path. Smoke test: file an issue with Igor's token and verify GH attribution (manual, gated on Steps 1+2 done).
